item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 191130Z AUTO 20008KT 9999 BKN013/// BKN023/// BKN028/// ///TCU 14/13 Q1017 TEMPO 22015G25KT BKN014
🟡 TAF LFOT 191100Z 1912/2012 20010KT 9999 BKN018 PROB40 TEMPO 1912/1915 BKN014 PROB30 TEMPO 1915/1920 20010G25KT -SHRA FEW020TCU PROB30 TEMPO 1920/2002 BKN012
